seo.description: onsmartAI terms of use. Learn about the conditions for using our enterprise AI Agents services.

1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
1.content: By accessing and using the onsmartAI website and our services, you accept and agree to comply with these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our services.

2.title: 2. About onsmartAI
2.content: onsmartAI is a company specialized in business transformation through Artificial Intelligence Agents, offering consulting, implementation and support for organizations that want to increase their productivity and operational efficiency.

3.title: 3. Services Offered
3.content: Our services include, but are not limited to:
items: Development and implementation of AI Agents

6.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
6.content: onsmartAI will not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use our services, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages.

7.title: 7. Modifications to Terms
7.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Modifications will take effect immediately after their publication on the website. It is your responsibility to periodically review these terms.

8.title: 8. Termination
8.content: We may terminate or suspend your access to our services immediately, without prior notice, for any reason, including, without limitation, if you violate these Terms of Use.

9.title: 9. Applicable Law
9.content: These Terms of Use are governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil. Any dispute will be resolved in the competent courts of Brazil.
